response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack and web developer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires principal-level hardware performance architecture expertise — SoC and IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appears in his background. His closest relevant work is low-latency backend services in D and some C/C++ IDE component work, which does not approach the required depth in silicon-level performance modeling, GPU architecture, or deep-learning workload optimization.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second
Polyglot systems programming exposure including C, C++, and D alongside strong testing and software craftsmanship practices
Long, consistent track record with open-source leadership and community teaching
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, silicon architecture, or hardware-software co-design experience anywhere in the resume
No GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or deep neural network training/inference optimization background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack product engineering, far from principal-level hardware performance architecture scope

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN workload optimization background
